positive.prompt: Design a React Native layout with accessible touch targets for mobile
Help me build an Expo component grid responsive to small screens
How do I design touch UX and gestures for a mobile app feed?

negative.prompt: Design the layout and color scheme of a web UI landing page
Audit the ARIA labels on a web application

evals.prompt: Design a touch-friendly card feed layout for a mobile app using React Native, including tap areas.
evals.expected_output: Generates a responsive mobile layout adhering to touch guidelines.
expectations: Touch targets satisfy minimum size recommendations (e.g. 48x48 dp)
Gestures or pull-to-refresh interactions are considered
Layout behaves responsively across iOS and Android device widths
Typography and visual contrast are optimized for mobile screens
